testcase.classname: focus trap - single focusable element chat button is visible and focusable

testcase.classname: focus trap - single focusable element Tab on the chat button keeps focus within the widget

testcase.classname: email transcript notification widget opens in designer mode with mock messages
testcase.name: email transcript notification widget opens in designer mode with mock messages

testcase.classname: email transcript notification aria-live regions exist for immediate notification delivery
testcase.name: email transcript notification aria-live regions exist for immediate notification delivery

testcase.classname: email transcript notification transcript container does not use assertive aria-live

testcase.name: bot initials accessibility widget loads with mock messages in designer mode

testcase.classname: bot initials accessibility bot messages use descriptive alt text instead of initials
testcase.name: bot initials accessibility bot messages use descriptive alt text instead of initials

testcase.classname: bot initials accessibility transcript renders bot messages with accessible content
testcase.name: bot initials accessibility transcript renders bot messages with accessible content

testcase.name: adaptive card radio button count adaptive card renders with the correct number of radio options

testcase.name: adaptive card radio button count radio buttons have correct accessible labels
